calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-21-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED BY THE COURT -- Defendant Guang Ming Liu's Demurrer to Complaint OVERRULED with 5 days to answer (JJM) LEE BATARA, CSR 3759

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-14-2002 Continued To Feb-21-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas E. Drohan, Esq., 415-861-4444, appeared on behalf of defendant and demurring party Guang Ming Liu. Mark E. Mallah, Esq., 415-398-1644, appeared on behalf of plaintiff and opposing party Henry Lew.

Pursuant to the oral request of the parties the demurrer to the complaint by Guang Ming Liu was ordered continued to February 21, 2002. (JJM) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
